CASE ASSIGNED TO DEPT. 602 FOR JURY TRIAL. PRESENT WERE: JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL, CLERK IRIS HAMMER, REPORTER RHONDA FUNG AND MICHAEL S. ROSSOFF FOR PLAINTIFF WITH ARTHUR HARRIS DEFENDANT IN PRO PER. PLAINTIFF'S MOTIONS TO DISMISS AND/OR TO CONTINUE THE MATTER WERE DENIED. THE CASE WAS CONTINUED TO 9:30AM ON MAY 31,2001 FOR JURY SELECTION.

DEPT. 602 JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL, REPORTER KAREN FARNS- WORTH, CLERK IRIS HAMMER. MICHAEL S. ROSSOFF, ESQ, PLNTF. DEFENDANT IN PRO PER ARTHUR HARRIS WERE PRESENT. DEFTS. MO DISMISS AND MO SANCTIONS DENIED. JURY SWORN WITNESES S/E DOC EVID INTRO. CONT TO 9:30AM JUNE 4, 2001.

DEPT. 602 JUEGE DONALD S. MITCHELL, REPORTER DIANA PADILLA, CLERK IRIS HAMMER MICHAEL S. ROSSOFF, ESQ. FOR PLNTF. DFT. ARTHUR HARRIS IN PRO PER WERE PRESENT. WITNESSES S.E, DOC. EVID INTRO. CLOSING ARGUMENTS MADE. JURY DELIBERATED. JURY RETURNED WITH VERDICT FOR DEFENDANT. JURY POLLED AND VERDICT WAS UNANIMOUS. VERDICT AND JURY INSTRUCTIONS FILED. EXHIBITS RETURNED TO MR. ROSSOFF. JURY THANKED AND DISCHARGED.
